economic_ownership_map.label: Operating business and net financial assets
economic_ownership_map.ownership_claim: Operating business and net financial assets

method_provenance.label: Owner earnings and reinvestment-return DCF
method_provenance.equation: cash_t = cash_(t-1)*(1+reinvestment*incremental_ROIC); value = PV(distributable cash + terminal owner earnings)

sources.locator: Owner cash, reinvestment and reverse expectations

low.label: Reinvestment rate
low.rationale: Versioned initial bounds; refresh from the issuer reinvestment ledger.

low.label: Incremental after-tax ROIC
low.rationale: Conservative bounded starting cases pending a longer primary-source capital bridge.

low.label: Discount rate
low.rationale: Approved risk bounds for the automated first pass.

low.label: Terminal owner-earnings multiple
low.rationale: Bounded terminal economics; high case remains below a perpetual high-growth assumption.

low.label: cash_pv
low.formula: present_value(owner_cash_y1, 1, owner_cash_y2, 2, owner_cash_y3, 3, owner_cash_y4, 4, owner_cash_y5, 5, owner_cash_y6, 6, owner_cash_y7, 7, discount_rate)

base.label: Reinvestment rate
base.rationale: Versioned initial bounds; refresh from the issuer reinvestment ledger.

base.label: Incremental after-tax ROIC
base.rationale: Conservative bounded starting cases pending a longer primary-source capital bridge.

base.label: Discount rate
base.rationale: Approved risk bounds for the automated first pass.

base.label: Terminal owner-earnings multiple
base.rationale: Bounded terminal economics; high case remains below a perpetual high-growth assumption.

base.label: cash_pv
base.formula: present_value(owner_cash_y1, 1, owner_cash_y2, 2, owner_cash_y3, 3, owner_cash_y4, 4, owner_cash_y5, 5, owner_cash_y6, 6, owner_cash_y7, 7, discount_rate)

high.label: Reinvestment rate
high.rationale: Versioned initial bounds; refresh from the issuer reinvestment ledger.

high.label: Incremental after-tax ROIC
high.rationale: Conservative bounded starting cases pending a longer primary-source capital bridge.

high.label: Discount rate
high.rationale: Approved risk bounds for the automated first pass.

high.label: Terminal owner-earnings multiple
high.rationale: Bounded terminal economics; high case remains below a perpetual high-growth assumption.

high.label: cash_pv
high.formula: present_value(owner_cash_y1, 1, owner_cash_y2, 2, owner_cash_y3, 3, owner_cash_y4, 4, owner_cash_y5, 5, owner_cash_y6, 6, owner_cash_y7, 7, discount_rate)

economic_ownership_map.evidence: Source-locked filing facts plus explicitly bounded versioned judgments.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Owner earnings, incremental returns, or reinvestment runway fall below the low-case bridge.

judgments.label: Operating business and net financial assets
judgments.evidence: Source-locked filing facts plus explicitly bounded versioned judgments.

method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
method_route.decision_rule: Power Zones select the fitting economic method and eligible independent reviewers; they never choose the valuation answer or capital decision.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

top_value_drivers.label: Operating business and net financial assets

falsifiers: Owner earnings, incremental returns, or reinvestment runway fall below the low-case bridge.
required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.
